feed.title: ramalauw
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ramalauw

entry.title: Me after achieving major milestones: nice! What's next? Gotta worry about that now. Me after the most minor mistake: I'm so stoöpeed! I can't do anything right! I'm not good enough 🤭 #free99 #taylorswift
entry.content: Me after achieving major milestones: nice! What's next? Gotta worry about that now. Me after the most minor mistake: I'm so stoöpeed! I can't do anything right! I'm not good enough 🤭 #free99 #taylorswift

entry.title: Wdym it's up to me to break the ✨generational tröoma✨? If my parents couldn't do it, how am I supposed to do it? 😭🤯🥵🤭 #Free99
entry.content: Wdym it's up to me to break the ✨generational tröoma✨? If my parents couldn't do it, how am I supposed to do it? 😭🤯🥵🤭 #Free99

entry.title: This video is a little different but I just wanna be real and vulnerable with you guys for once 😔
entry.content: This video is a little different but I just wanna be real and vulnerable with you guys for once 😔

entry.title: Me: I go to the gym all the time, I don't know why I'm not any results 😔🤷‍♂️😡 Also me: #gym #fitness #fitnessmotivation #gymtok #fyp #foryou #tiktokusa
entry.content: Me: I go to the gym all the time, I don't know why I'm not any results 😔🤷‍♂️😡 Also me: #gym #fitness #fitnessmotivation #gymtok #fyp #foryou #tiktokusa

entry.title: Me to my ✨Anx1ety✨: People are too focused on themselves and their own problems, nobody is thinking about you! 😉 ✨Depreschön✨: ever… Me: 😭🫠🥲 #Free99 #fyp #foryou #tiktokusa #adulting #mentalhealth #therapy

entry.title: “The sooner I go to sleep the sooner I have to get up and have to do it all over again…” 🤡 #Free99 #lifeadvice #lifehacks #motivational

entry.title: They can’t leave you if you ✨leave them first✨ 🤭 #Free99 #attachmentstyle #relationship #mentalhealth
